model_specification_line: smf.wls('full_time ~ treatment + C(year) + C(statefip)', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='HC3')
outcome_definition: full_time = (uhrswork between 35 and 80 treated as True, else False)
sample_selection: hispand detailed codes capture Mexican origin
treatment_definition: arrival before 2007, arrival age below 16, birth year >= 1981
